---
title: "Applied Data Science & ML"
subtitle: "Hi, my name is Billy. This is where I try to archive topics related to Applied Data Science & ML."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
